ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument (e.g., technology, finance, healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument (e.g., software, banking, pharmaceuticals) */,
  "instrument_symbol" TEXT /* Unique symbol for the instrument (e.g., AAPL for Apple Inc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., stock market, futures market, forex market) */,
  "market_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candlesticks" (
  "candlestick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candlestick */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Open time of the candlestick */,
  "open" TEXT /* Open price of the candlestick */,
  "high" TEXT /* High price of the candlestick */,
  "low" TEXT /* Low price of the candlestick */,
  "close" TEXT /* Close price of the candlestick */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume of the candlestick */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Close time of the candlestick */,
  "candlestick_interval" TEXT /* Time interval for the candlestick (e.g., 1 minute, 1 hour, 1 day) */,
  "candlestick_status" TEXT /* Status of the candlestick (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candlestick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candlesticks_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candlesticks_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qavs" (
  "qav_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QAV */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "qav" TEXT /* Quote Asset Volume */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the QAV data (e.g., exchange, broker, data vendor) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of QAV data updates (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qav_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qavs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trade */,
  "trade_price" TEXT /* Price of the trade */,
  "trade_volume" TEXT /* Volume of the trade */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade data (e.g., exchange, broker, data vendor) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of trade data updates (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taker_bbas" (
  "taker_bba_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Taker BBA */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "taker_bba" TEXT /* Taker Buy/Sell Asset Volume */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the Taker BBA data (e.g., exchange, broker, data vendor) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of Taker BBA data updates (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taker_bba_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taker_bbas_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taker_bqavs" (
  "taker_bqav_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Taker BQAV */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "taker_bqav" TEXT /* Taker Buy Quote Asset Volume */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the Taker BQAV data (e.g., exchange, broker, data vendor) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of Taker BQAV data updates (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taker_bqav_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taker_bqavs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface, mobile app) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_markets" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candlestick_qavs" (
  "candlestick_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candlestick */,
  "qav_id" INTEGER /* ID of the QAV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candlestick_id", "qav_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candlestick_trades" (
  "candlestick_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candlestick */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candlestick_id", "trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_taker_bbas" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "taker_bba_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Taker BBAV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "taker_bba_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_taker_bqavs" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "taker_bqav_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Taker BQAV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "taker_bqav_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_candlesticks" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "candlestick_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candlestick */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id", "candlestick_id")
)
